requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 240 V / 50 Hz, Type I (Australian) Plug

summary.en: Tonga operates on 240 V / 50 Hz mains electricity and uses the Type I (Australian/New Zealand) plug and socket standard (AS/NZS 3112). Wireless and IoT devices with mains power connections, power adapters, or charging docks must comply with the Type I plug standard and demonstrate electrical safety consistent with AS/NZS standards. AS/NZS 62368-1 (audio/video and IT equipment) and AS/NZS 3820 (essential requirements for electrical equipment) are the primary electrical safety references for consumer electronic and wireless devices sold in Tonga. CE (LVD) and Chinese CCC electrical safety approvals are not recognised in Tonga. AS/NZS-based test reports from accredited laboratories are accepted. Battery-powered devices with no mains connection are lower risk but must still meet AS/NZS safety standards for batteries and charging circuits if supplied with a charger.
summary.zh: 汤加使用240V/50Hz市电，采用I型（澳式/新西兰式）插头和插座标准（AS/NZS 3112）。带有市电接口、电源适配器或充电底座的无线及物联网设备，须符合I型插头标准，并证明电气安全符合AS/NZS标准。AS/NZS 62368-1（音视频及IT设备）和AS/NZS 3820（电气设备基本要求）是汤加消费电子及无线设备的主要电气安全参考标准。CE（低压指令）及中国CCC电气安全认证在汤加不被认可。经认可实验室出具的AS/NZS测试报告可被接受。纯电池供电设备风险较低，但若随附充电器，仍须符合AS/NZS电池和充电电路安全标准。
summary.zht: 東加使用240V/50Hz市電，採用I型（澳式/新西蘭式）插頭和插座標準（AS/NZS 3112）。帶有市電接口、電源適配器或充電底座的無線及物聯網裝置，須符合I型插頭標準，並證明電氣安全符合AS/NZS標準。AS/NZS 62368-1（音視頻及IT設備）和AS/NZS 3820（電氣設備基本要求）是東加消費電子及無線裝置的主要電氣安全參考標準。CE（低壓指令）及中國CCC電氣安全認證在東加不被認可。經認可實驗室出具的AS/NZS測試報告可被接受。純電池供電裝置風險較低，但若隨附充電器，仍須符合AS/NZS電池和充電電路安全標準。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 3112:2011 — Approval and test specification for plugs and socket-outlets (Type I — Australian/New Zealand standard adopted in Tonga)
AS/NZS 62368-1:2022 — Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety requirements (IEC 62368-1 aligned)
AS/NZS 3820:1998 — Essential requirements for electrical equipment (general electrical safety framework referenced in Pacific markets)

summary.en: In China, mains-connected electrical equipment must comply with GB 4943.1 (IT equipment safety, aligned to IEC 62368-1) and use the Chinese Type I flat-pin or Type G three-pin plugs under GB 2099.1 and GB 1002. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is required for in-scope electrical products, including power adapters and many consumer electronics with mains connections. These CCC approvals and GB-based test reports are not recognised in Tonga.
summary.zh: 在中国，接入市电的电气设备须符合GB 4943.1（IT设备安全，与IEC 62368-1对应）的要求，并使用GB 2099.1和GB 1002规定的中国I型平脚或G型三脚插头。须对范围内的电气产品（包括电源适配器及大多数带市电接口的消费电子产品）取得CCC强制认证。上述CCC认证及GB测试报告在汤加不被认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，接入市電的電氣設備須符合GB 4943.1（IT設備安全，與IEC 62368-1對應）的要求，並使用GB 2099.1和GB 1002規定的中國I型平腳或G型三腳插頭。須對範圍內的電氣產品（包括電源適配器及大多數帶市電接口的消費電子產品）取得CCC強制認證。上述CCC認證及GB測試報告在東加不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Safety of information technology equipment (aligned to IEC 62368-1 / formerly IEC 60950)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification for electrical equipment including power adapters and consumer electronics
GB 2099.1 — Plugs and socket-outlets for household and similar purposes (Chinese plug standard)
GB 1002 — Chinese plugs and socket-outlets single phase (Type I flat-pin and G-type)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety approvals and GB-based test reports are not recognised in Tonga. Products with mains power connections or supplied with power adapters must demonstrate AS/NZS electrical safety compliance, typically via AS/NZS 62368-1 test reports from an accredited laboratory. Power plugs shipped for Tonga must be Type I (Australian two-flat-pin or three-flat-pin) under AS/NZS 3112 — Chinese plugs and adapters are not compliant without modification. Products with universal voltage adapters (100-240 V) reduce the voltage risk but must still comply with AS/NZS plug and safety standards.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证及GB测试报告在汤加不被认可。带有市电接口或随附电源适配器的产品，须证明符合AS/NZS电气安全要求，通常需提供经认可实验室出具的AS/NZS 62368-1测试报告。为汤加市场供货的电源插头须符合AS/NZS 3112 I型（澳式两脚平插或三脚平插）标准——中国插头和适配器未经改造不合规。带宽压适配器（100-240V）的产品可降低电压风险，但仍须符合AS/NZS插头和安全标准。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證及GB測試報告在東加不被認可。帶有市電接口或隨附電源適配器的產品，須證明符合AS/NZS電氣安全要求，通常需提供經認可實驗室出具的AS/NZS 62368-1測試報告。為東加市場供貨的電源插頭須符合AS/NZS 3112 I型（澳式兩腳平插或三腳平插）標準——中國插頭和適配器未經改造不合規。帶寬壓適配器（100-240V）的產品可降低電壓風險，但仍須符合AS/NZS插頭和安全標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — AS/NZS electrical safety compliance and Type I (AS/NZS 3112) plug required for mains-connected or charger-supplied devices in Tonga
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification and GB electrical safety standards required for mains-connected electrical products in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Meteorology, Energy, Information, Disaster Management, Environment, Climate Change and Communications (MIC-Tonga)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC electrical safety approvals are not recognised in Tonga. Mains-connected or charger-supplied wireless devices require AS/NZS 62368-1 test evidence and must use or be supplied with a Type I (Australian AS/NZS 3112) plug. Chinese plugs do not fit Tongan sockets and products must be reconfigured or re-certified for the Tonga market.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC电气安全认证在汤加不被认可。带市电接口或随附充电器的无线设备须提供AS/NZS 62368-1测试证明，并须配备或随附I型（澳式AS/NZS 3112）插头。中国插头不适用于汤加插座，产品须针对汤加市场重新配置或重新认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC電氣安全認證在東加不被認可。帶市電接口或隨附充電器的無線裝置須提供AS/NZS 62368-1測試證明，並須配備或隨附I型（澳式AS/NZS 3112）插頭。中國插頭不適用於東加插座，產品須針對東加市場重新配置或重新認證。
